title: Login Page - Dark Glassmorphism Style
prompt:
Title: Login Page - Dark Glassmorphism Style
Context: Login page for GOOGLE AI ECOSYSTEM BOOTCAMP 2026 participants.
Description of the screen: A sleek, full-screen 'Dark Mode' Login Page for 'GOOGLE AI ECOSYSTEM BOOTCAMP 2026'. 
- Background: A deep charcoal/navy gradient with a faint, animated-like grid or geometric pattern, using subtle Google-colored glows in the corners.
- Central Card: A glassmorphism-style login container (semi-transparent with blur).
- Headline: 'Đăng nhập hệ thống BootCamp 2026' centered at the top of the card.
- Form: High-contrast inputs for 'Email' and 'Mật khẩu'.
- Main Button: 'Đăng nhập' button with a vibrant hover state.
- Google Login: A large, modern 'Tiếp tục với Google' button with the iconic logo.
- Links: 'Quên mật khẩu?' and 'Đăng ký tham gia ngay' positioned clearly at the bottom.
- Overall feel: Cutting-edge, secure, and futuristic, aligning with the AI theme. Variant 2 of 2.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
